revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" !Code||Language |- |4cs||4CS |- |6502acme||[[MOS Technology 6502|MOS 6502]] (6510) ACME Cross Assembler |- |6502kickass||[[MOS Technology 6502|MOS 6502]] (6510) Kick Assembler |- |6502tasm||[[MOS Technology 6502|MOS 6502]] (6510) TASM/64TASS |- |68000devpac||[[Motorola 68000]] HiSoft Devpac ST 2 Assembler |- |abap||[[ABAP]] |- |actionscript||[[ActionScript]] |- |apt_sources||[[Advanced Packaging Tool|APT sources]] |- |arm||[[ARM architecture family|ARM]] Assembler |- |asm||[[Assembly language|Assembly]] |- |asp||[[Active Server Pages]] (ASP) |- |asymptote||[[Asymptote (vector graphics language)|Asymptote]] |- |autoconf||[[Autoconf]] |- |autohotkey||[[AutoHotkey]] |- |autoit||[[AutoIt]] |- |avisynth||[[AviSynth]] |- |awk||[[AWK]] |- |bascomavr||BASCOM AVR |- |bash||[[Bash (Unix shell)|Bash]] |- |basic4gl||[[Basic4GL]] |- |bf||[[Brainfuck]] |- |bibtex||[[BibTeX]] |- |blitzbasic||[[Blitz BASIC]] |- |bnf||[[Backus–Naur form]] |- |boo||[[Boo (programming language)|Boo]] |- |c||[[C (programming language)|C]] |- |c_loadrunner||C Loadrunner |- |c_mac||C (Mac) |- |caddcl||AutoCAD [[Dialog Control Language]] (DCL) |- revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Expensive}} {{tsh|sxhl}} Simple wrapper around the [[mw:Extension:SyntaxHighlight|syntaxhighlight]] tag to show [[Syntax highlighting|syntax-highlighted]] text. Unlike syntaxhighlight, text that does not fit on the screen will be [[:en:Text wrap|wrapped]]. ==Usage== {{tlx|Syntaxhighlight|''code''|''lang''}} * ''code'' will become the contents of the syntax highlighted block. * Use {{para|lang|wikitext}} for Mediawiki or [[Help:wikitext|wikitext]] markup. Other supported languages are listed below. * The {{tag|syntaxhighlight|o}} tag used by this template is [[WP:EXPENSIVE]], so, if used on a page with 500 or more 'expensive' parser functions, subsequent instances of this template after the 500th expensive function use on that page will always be rendered as unhighlighted {{tag|code}} blocks (without syntax highlighting) instead of syntax-highlighted {{tag|syntaxhighlight}} blocks. ==Supported languages== {{main|mw: Extension: SyntaxHighlight#Supported_languages}} {{Incomplete list}} {| class="wikitable" style="float:left" !Code||Language |- |4cs||4CS |- |6502acme||[[MOS Technology 6502|MOS 6502]] (6510) ACME Cross Assembler |- |6502kickass||[[MOS Technology 6502|MOS 6502]] (6510) Kick Assembler |- |6502tasm||[[MOS Technology 6502|MOS 6502]] (6510) TASM/64TASS |- |68000devpac||[[Motorola 68000]] HiSoft Devpac ST 2 Assembler |- |abap||[[:en:ABAP|ABAP]] |- |actionscript||[[:en:ActionScript|ActionScript]] |- |actionscript3||[[:en:ActionScript|ActionScript]]3 |- |ada||[[Ada (programming language)|Ada]] |- |algol68||[[:en:ALGOL 68|ALGOL 68]] |- |apache||[[:en:Apache HTTP Server|Apache configuration]] |- |applescript||[[:en:AppleScript|AppleScript]] |- |apt_sources||[[:en:Advanced Packaging Tool|APT sources]] |- |arm||[[:en:ARM architecture family|ARM]] Assembler |- |asm||[[:en:Assembly language|Assembly]] |- |asp||[[:en:Active Server Pages|Active Server Pages]] (ASP) |- |asymptote||[[Asymptote (vector graphics language)|Asymptote]] |- |autoconf||[[:en:Autoconf|Autoconf]] |- |autohotkey||[[:en:AutoHotkey|AutoHotkey]] |- |autoit||[[:en:AutoIt|AutoIt]] |- |avisynth||[[:en:AviSynth|AviSynth]] |- |awk||[[:en:AWK|AWK]] |- |bascomavr||BASCOM AVR |- |bash||[[Bash (Unix
